schemaPending.title: Database migration pending
schemaPending.body: Run {command} to enable saving setup progress.

path.title: How are you getting started?
path.subtitle: Brand-new studio or moving from another system — we'll tailor the next steps.

scratch.title: Start from scratch
scratch.body: You're opening fresh or have a small roster to enter by hand.

import.title: I have an existing studio
import.body: Bulk import from StudioPro, Class Manager, or any spreadsheet.

profile.title: Tell us about your studio
profile.subtitle: This helps us personalise your site, class suggestions, and local settings.
profile.aboutPlaceholder: Community-focused preschool ballet, competition teams, adult open classes…
profile.stylesRequired: Pick at least one style to continue.

students.title: Add your dancers
students.subtitle: Paste, upload a CSV, or type rows — parent/guardian columns are linked automatically.
students.pastePlaceholder:
Name	Email	Phone	Parent Name	Parent Email
Emma Johnson	emma@example.com	021 234 567	Jane Johnson	jane@example.com
students.detected: {count, plural, one {# dancer detected} other {# dancers detected}}
students.linkParents: Create parent accounts & link families when parent details are provided
students.import: Import {count, plural, one {# dancer} other {# dancers}}

classes.title: Build your timetable
classes.subtitle: Upload a CSV, paste a class list, or start from suggestions based on your styles.
classes.pastePlaceholder:
Class	Style	Day	Start	End	Capacity	Price
Junior Ballet	Ballet	Mon	16:00	17:00	15	18
classes.detected: {count, plural, one {# class detected} other {# classes detected}}
classes.create: Create {count, plural, one {# class} other {# classes}}

tour.title: {studioName} is ready
tour.subtitle: Here's what you can do in Olune — explore anytime from your dashboard.

importSummary.added: Added {count, plural, one {# dancer} other {# dancers}}
importSummary.parentsLinked: {count, plural, one {# parent link} other {# parent links}}

resume.title: Finish setting up your studio
resume.body: You paused at {step} — pick up where you left off.

studiopro.name: StudioPro
studiopro.hint: Export your student list from Reports → Students → Export CSV.
studiopro.sampleHeaders: First Name · Last Name · Email · Phone · Parent Name · Parent Email

classmanager.name: Class Manager
classmanager.hint: Download your roster from Settings → Data export.
classmanager.sampleHeaders: Student · Email · Mobile · Guardian · Guardian Email · Class

jackrabbit.name: Jackrabbit Dance
jackrabbit.hint: Use Families → Export, or copy directly from your class roster grid.
jackrabbit.sampleHeaders: Student Name · Student Email · Family Email · Phone · Classes

dancestudio-pro.name: DanceStudio-Pro
dancestudio-pro.hint: Export students from the Students tab, or paste from your spreadsheet.
dancestudio-pro.sampleHeaders: Name · Email · Phone · Parent · Parent Email

spreadsheet.name: Spreadsheet
spreadsheet.hint: Copy rows from Excel or Google Sheets — we'll detect columns automatically.

other.name: Another system
other.hint: Paste any export — we'll try to match name, email, and phone columns.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.body: See enrolments, revenue, and today's schedule at a glance.

classes.title: Classes
classes.body: Build your timetable, set capacity, and manage waitlists.

students.title: Students & families
students.body: Roster, enrolments, progress notes, and parent accounts.

billing.title: Billing
billing.body: Invoices, Stripe payments, and term fees in NZD.

website.title: Website
website.body: Your public site — classes, enrolments, and your brand.

leads.title: Leads & messages
leads.body: Trial enquiries and two-way messaging with families.
